sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42595" key="e(rma/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑρμάν</orth>, <sense id="n42595.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἕρμα</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Harp.</author> </bibl> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἑρμάν</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Ἑρμῆς.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
